description: JSON Schemas for the declaration files a pack author writes to enable the platform first-class modules (manifest + xrm/worklist/scheduling/surveys/automation/roles/journey/taps/commands/messages). Generated from the exported Zod schemas via z.toJSONSchema (io:input). The runtime primitives that consume these declarations are in platform-primitives.json; the platform-provided entities are in system-entities.json.

manifest.summary: The pack manifest — id, version, agents, flows, channels, adapters, config, media, env. The one required file.

xrm.summary: XRM records module — custom entities (typed fields + optional stage pipeline), saved segments, and a demo: seed block.

worklist.summary: Worklist / casework — queues + work item types (routing, SLA, dispositions). Casework is a preset over this engine.

scheduling.summary: Scheduling — which XRM entities are bookable, resource/slot config, and reminder offsets.

surveys.summary: Surveys — declarative survey definitions submitted via survey_submit.

automation.summary: Automation — standing scheduled/triggered jobs the platform runs for the pack.

roles.summary: RBAC — custom roles + their grants for the pack (console access control).

journey.summary: Customer journey — lifecycle stages, goals, and events tracked per contact.

taps.summary: Tap declarations — how button/list taps route to tools (t:<verb>:<target>:<bindings>).

commands.summary: Slash commands — map a match (e.g. /clear) to an action.

messages.summary: Message copy overrides — per-agent error/kill-switch wording + platform error copy.
